Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is extremely vague with no context about what happens, permissions required, or consequences. Added clarity about permanence, data removal, authentication requirements, and irreversibility to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it should be used.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user account identified by userId. This operation removes the user from the system and all associated data. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions. This action is irreversible. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague with no context about what happens, permissions required, or consequences. Added clarity about permanence, data removal, authentication requirements, and irreversibility to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it should be used.

message: Operation 'listNotifications' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks any detail about scope, filtering, sorting, or what data is returned. Enhanced to clarify that it retrieves notifications for the authenticated user, explain typical sorting behavior, and indicate authentication requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all notifications for authenticated user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all notifications for the authenticated user. Returns notification objects containing details such as type, message, related entity, and read status. Notifications are typically sorted by creation date in descending order (newest first). Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks any detail about scope, filtering, sorting, or what data is returned. Enhanced to clarify that it retrieves notifications for the authenticated user, explain typical sorting behavior, and indicate authentication requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'markNotificationRead' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and lacks context about what changes occur, what is returned, and idempotency behavior.
